channel.title: Chongquan's Blog RSS
channel.description: Blogs about engineering, building products, AI and practical notes.

item.title: Template: My Journey from Junior to Senior Developer
item.description: A template long-form post for career reflections, growth checkpoints, and lessons learned in real projects.

item.title: Template: Building My First Production App
item.description: A structured write-up template for launch retrospectives, incidents, and practical implementation notes.

item.title: Template: Clean Code Principles That Actually Matter
item.description: A practical template post focused on maintainability, readability, and engineering quality tradeoffs.

item.title: Template: Designing a System for 1M Users
item.description: A system design template article for architecture diagrams, bottleneck analysis, and scale planning.

item.title: Template: Data Visualization for Better Product Decisions
item.description: A web development template article for dashboard patterns, narrative structure, and visual communication.

item.title: Beginning Here
item.description: Starting a new writing space for software and systems.

item.title: Understanding the Execution Order of setTimeout, setImmediate, and process.nextTick in Node.js
item.description: A practical look at how timers, setImmediate, and nextTick behave in the Node.js event loop.
